segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video for a Grout Cleaner Kit with Stand-Up Brush.

Timeline:
0-3s: Show a real-life wrong behavior — a person on hands and knees on a kitchen tile floor, scrubbing dark grout lines with a tiny handheld brush. Close-up details: knees pressing against hard tile, red marks forming, sweat on brow, grout unchanged despite effort. Amplify the physical discomfort and ineffectiveness.

3-6s: Quickly introduce the product as the direct solution. The Grout-eez white cleaner bottle with red and blue label enters frame alongside the bright blue V-shaped stand-up grout brush head attached to a threaded pole. Person stands upright, glides the V-shaped brush across a grout line effortlessly. Grime lifts immediately as the brush passes. The wide blue brush head with dense white nylon bristles hugs the grout line perfectly.

6-10s: Fast-cut scene 1 — Kitchen tile floor showing the first clear result. The V-shaped brush sweeps across grout lines, revealing clean bright grout behind it. Person standing comfortably, brush head swiveling smoothly. The contrast between the dirty pass and the clean restored grout is immediate and dramatic.

Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity. Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure. Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.

Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.

Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.

Do not start with a perfect product shot. Do not end with a CTA in this segment. Keep the pacing fast, clear, and product-focused.
segments.negative_prompt: No text overlays, no logos, no watermarks, no slow motion, no cinematic slow pans, no talking head, no influencer persona, no exaggerated cartoon effects, no unnatural lighting

segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video continuing from a previous segment, featuring a Grout Cleaner Kit with Stand-Up Brush.

Timeline:
0-4s: Fast-cut scene 2 in a different real-life usage environment — a bathroom. The blue V-shaped stand-up grout brush head swivels around the toilet base and into tight corners. Grout lines restore to a light clean color as the brush passes. No bending or kneeling needed. White dense nylon bristles work into the grout lines effortlessly.

4-8s: Fast-cut scene 3 showing final result — wide shot of a fully restored tile floor with bright clean grout lines. The person stands tall holding the Grout-eez white bottle and blue brush head on pole, satisfied expression. The entire space looks fresh, clean, and renewed. Bright uniform grout lines contrast with previously dark dirty grout.

8-10s: Short CTA. The product bottle and blue brush head centered against a clean tile background. Text overlay fades in: 'Clean grout standing up. Professional results at home.'

Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity. Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure. Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.

Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.

Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.

This segment should feel like the continuation of the previous 10-second segment. Keep the same product identity, visual style, pacing, and usage logic.
segments.negative_prompt: No text overlays except CTA, no logos, no watermarks, no slow motion, no cinematic slow pans, no talking head, no influencer persona, no exaggerated cartoon effects, no unnatural lighting
